name: joint_calibration_envelope
value: At q=1 require M_scale*M + W_scale*W <= S; torque-only failure rows also inspect q_peak=S/(2W) and max payable axial power S^2/(4W).
note: Use this packet to decide whether live calibration must change axial source power swirl wake power motor torque curve or all three before runtime coupling review.
